early.notes: Unlocks Archer hero (major roster DPS increase).
Adds Knight active life-steal sustain (18% of dealt damage while active).
Adds Archer active and +8% Archer damage from _hero_damage_mult().
Adds Guardian shield window via shield_time.
Unlocks Mage hero (screen-wide tick damage active + marks).
Adds Mage active and +8% Mage damage from _hero_damage_mult().
knight attack speed +0.16 per level (from base 1.2 => +13.33% APS per level before multipliers).
knight direct damage stat +3 per level (from base 12 => +25.0% knight hit damage per level before multipliers).
Direct incoming-damage factor improved by 3.5% per level (capped by 75% from core_armor path).
archer attack speed +0.16 per level (from base 1.2 => +13.33% APS per level before multipliers).
Repeatable: effects stack approximately linearly until internal clamps/caps.

Repeatable: effects stack approximately linearly until internal clamps/caps.
guardian attack speed +0.16 per level (from base 1.2 => +13.33% APS per level before multipliers).
guardian direct damage stat +3 per level (from base 12 => +25.0% guardian hit damage per level before multipliers).

mage direct damage stat +3 per level (from base 12 => +25.0% mage hit damage per level before multipliers).
